subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards God! Though outwardly thou art not present in this assemblage of the All-Merciful, yet praise be unto God, in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله هر چند بظاهر در این انجمن رحمانی حاضر نیستی ولی الحمد لله در
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @law of obligatory prayer
